title: ItzMart's Performance (low-end edition)
description: Designed to enhance Minecraft's performance on lower-end PCs without compromising quality. Based primarily on Sodium.
body:
"ItzMart's Performance (Low End Edition)" is a modpack designed to enhance Minecraft's performance on lower-end PCs without compromising the quality of your gaming experience. By leveraging the power of Sodium and other performance-boosting mods, this modpack ensures a smoother, faster, and more responsive gameplay experience.

Key Features:

Sodium: Replaces Minecraft's renderer with a more efficient and optimized version, drastically improving frame rates and reducing lag. (this is the main mod)

Sodium Extra: Adds extra functionalities to Sodium for even better performance and customization options.

Lithium: Optimizes numerous game mechanics and systems, resulting in better overall performance without affecting gameplay or visuals.

Dynamic FPS: Adjusts frame rates dynamically when Minecraft is running in the background, saving system resources.

Entity Culling: Prevents rendering of entities that are out of sight, improving performance during gameplay.

FerriteCore: Reduces memory usage by optimizing the way Minecraft handles data.
Krypton: Enhances network performance, reducing latency and improving the multiplayer experience.

ImmediatelyFast: Speeds up various aspects of Minecraft to improve overall responsiveness.

ModernFix: Fixes bugs and optimizes performance for modern systems.

Cloth Config API: Provides a user-friendly interface for configuring the various mods included in the pack.

Fabric API: Essential library for running Fabric-based mods.


Why Download ItzMart's Performance (Low End Edition)?

Optimized for Low-End PCs: Specifically tailored to run smoothly on lower-spec hardware, making Minecraft accessible and enjoyable for more players.

Ideal for Raspberry Pi: Perfect for those looking to run Minecraft on a Raspberry Pi, providing a lightweight and efficient solution for smooth gameplay on minimal hardware.

No Compromises: Enjoy a full Minecraft experience with enhanced performance without sacrificing visual quality or gameplay features.

User-Friendly: Easy to install and configure, with a focus on out-of-the-box performance improvements.

Enhanced Multiplayer: Experience smoother and more responsive multiplayer sessions with reduced latency and improved network performance.

Continual Updates: Regular updates ensure compatibility with the latest Minecraft versions and continuous performance improvements.

Whether you're running Minecraft on an older laptop, a low-spec desktop, or even a Raspberry Pi, "ItzMart's Performance (Low End Edition)" is your go-to solution for a lag-free and enjoyable gaming experience. Download now and transform the way you play Minecraft!
